snapshot.description: Implement a lightweight Backend service (Cloud Function/FastAPI Proxy) that orchestrates the workflow between the Flutter App and the dedicated AI Server (Ngrok). See architectural decision at @doc/(root)/system-architecture-and-database-schema.
snapshot.title: Backend Orchestrator for AI Server (Microservice)

newValue.text: Setup a Firestore trigger listening for `status: 'UPLOADED'` on `metaphase_images`.
Implement HTTP client to send a JSON payload containing ONLY the `raw_image_url` and `orderId` to the external AI Server (Ngrok). *(Do not download the image)*
Set appropriate timeouts (e.g., 120s) and handle `ngrok-skip-browser-warning` headers.
Parse the returned AI JSON result.
Implement Firebase Admin SDK bulk-write logic to securely insert `Chromosome` documents into Firestore.
Update the `MetaphaseImage` status to `COMPLETED` and trigger the App's UI to update.
